revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a game-development pixel-art animated sprite sheet.

Use the attached reference image as the identity source. Treat this as re-posing the exact referenced character, not designing a new one. Match the reference proportions, head-to-body ratio, slim-but-sturdy body width, palette, dark outline style, pixel density, clothing details, and overall scale exactly.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact sheet size: 1024x512 px.
- Layout: 2 rows x 4 columns, 8 frames total.
- Each frame cell is exactly 256x256 px.
- TOP row = frames 1-4 from left to right.
- BOTTOM row = frames 5-8 from left to right.
- No visible grid lines, no cell separator lines, no frame borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark.
- Background must be a completely flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta in every empty pixel, no gradients, no texture, no shadows outside the sprite.
- Exactly one character per cell.
- Clear solid magenta margin around the full character in every cell.
- Nothing may cross cell borders. No detached fragments, no isolated dust pixels, no leftover effects, no floating parts.

Style:
- High-resolution 16-bit-plus SNES-style pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent bright cheerful palette.
- One-pixel dark outline where useful.
- Top-left light source.
- Fine readable pixel clusters like the provided reference.

Character identity, facing, and outfit:
- Character is Mito, an androgynous 15-year-old mythical-Japan RPG wanderer.
- Facing UP in a top-down 3/4 back view: show the back of the head, tiny low ponytail at the nape with vermilion cord, and the back of the indigo haori. Do not show the face or eyes from the front.
- Ink-black short hair, tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape with a vermilion braided-cord hair ornament.
- White tube-sleeved top visible at sleeves, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem.
- Loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties.
- Light travel sandals.
- Vermilion braided cord belt-sash with small tassel.
- Necklace with three pale-green magatama beads may be barely visible only if consistent with back view.
- At the LEFT hip across the lower back hangs a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard, wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers. It must read as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.
- No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no modern objects.

Strict proportion lock:
- Exact same character identity and exact same scale in all eight frames.
- Same head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, and total standing body height in every frame.
- Re-pose only. Never redraw, restyle, widen, shrink, or resize the character.
- Character should be drawn LARGE, filling most of the cell height with a small margin, matching the reference size feel.
- Standing body height in pixels must match across upright frames.
- Feet stay on the same ground line in every cell.
- Head stays at the same overall height except for the explicit 1px breathing lift/drop described below.

Stance lock:
- Relaxed natural stance with both feet planted shoulder-width apart.
- Visible gap of empty magenta ground between the two ankles.
- Legs nearly vertical and relaxed.
- Do not make feet touch or press together.
- Do not make a wide horse stance.
- Feet NEVER move between frames. Weight evenly on both feet.

Sword lock:
- The white scabbard remains sheathed at his LEFT hip across the lower back in the exact same position, angle, and length in every frame.
- The sword never drifts, never changes size, never appears in the hand.

Animation: 8-frame subtle breathing idle loop, one direction only, facing UP/back view.
- Frame 1: neutral relaxed stance.
- Frame 2: slow inhale; chest/back and shoulders rise only 1-2 px, subtle haori lift.
- Frame 3: inhale peak; head lifts 1 px, shoulders at highest point, still very subtle.
- Frame 4: breath held; vermilion cord tassels and haori hem drift slightly.
- Frame 5: exhale begins; shoulders settle downward.
- Frame 6: lowest relaxed point; body is 1-2 px lower than neutral, still feet fixed on same ground line.
- Frame 7: calm blink phase from behind: since the character faces away, show the blink only as a tiny subtle head/eyelid cue if visible from 3/4 back; body returns toward neutral. Do not turn the face forward.
- Frame 8: eyes open/back to neutral stance; seamless return to frame 1.
- Silhouette changes must be small and smooth. Quiet idle, not action.
- Haori back panel and sash knot sway very subtly only.

Avoid completely:
- Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, or likenesses.
- No bird or companion creature.
- No letter emblems.
- No horror mood, no dark gloomy palette.
- No gun, no UI, no modern text, no watermark.

Final output must be a single clean PNG sprite sheet, 1024x512 px, 4 columns by 2 rows, solid #FF00FF background, eight contained frames, exactly one same-scale back-facing Mito character per cell.
